Drive engagement and build stronger connections with clients and members. With three tiers of customization, our Pro, Studio, and Enterprise branded apps are the ultimate way to digitize your business and deliver a training experience that is uniquely yours.

After signing up for a trial, you'll be able to enjoy all of ABC Trainerize's core features for 30 days, completely free of charge. There is no credit card required to activate your trial. At the end of the 30 days, you can upgrade to the paid plan of your choice. If you do not upgrade, you will be automatically downgraded to our Free plan with limited clients and features.

Once you've activated your trial or purchased your plan, there a lot of resources to get you started. In the web app, you'll find a setup guide with instructional videos and guided walk-throughs on how to quickly create training programs and how to use key features in ABC Trainerize.
Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time, and can make those changes yourself right from your ABC Trainerize account.

Note that not all features are available or included with all plans, so be sure to review what is or isn't included in your new plan before completing the change. You will lose access to any features or add-ons not included in or available with your new plan as of your next billing cycle. For example, if you choose to downgrade from a Studio plan to a Pro or Grow plan, you may lose access to your included add-ons (Custom Branded App, Video Coaching, Advanced Nutrition Coaching, Stripe Integrated
What happens when I change plans?
When changing to a larger plan or a longer billing cycle, the change is applied immediately and the pro-rated difference is charged to your account.

When changing to a smaller or Free plan, or when switching to a shorter billing cycle, the change is applied at the end of the current billing cycle. You can continue to use your current paid plan until that date. We are unable to issue refunds for unused portions of your subscription.

All of ABC Trainerize's powerful core features are included in the subscription price for all of our paid plans. However, if you choose to level up your subscription through our add-ons, there are a few additional costs you may encounter.

Select add-ons are available to Grow and Pro plan users at an addtional cost to their base plan subscription and can be purchased at any time. Our Studio plans include access to most of our add-ons at no additional cost, though usage limits, transaction fees, and overage charges still apply. For add-on pricing for Enterprise plans, please contact us directly.

The Advanced Nutrition Coaching Add-on allows you to generate and deliver custom meal plans, contribute meals and recipes to your business's meal library, and give clients access to the best meals to cook and track in-app. The add-on costs $5/mo for Grow, Pro 5, and Pro 15 plans, $45/mo for Pro 30 to Pro 200 plans, and it is included as part of the Studio plan cost.
The Pro Custom Branded App add-on has a one-time setup fee of $169 for Pro plan. The Studio Custom Branded App is included as part of the Studio and Enterprise plans.

The Video Coaching add-on includes a monthly bundle of video calling and video streaming hours to let you run virtual coaching calls or PT sessions, and host on-demand workouts. The Pro plan add-on is a $10 USD monthly subscription and includes 50h video calling + 100h video streaming. The Studio plan add-on is included in the Studio plan cost and inclues includes 500h video calling + 5000h video streaming. Extra time can be purchased in packs (Video call time is sold in packs of 20 hours for $1

The Stripe Integrated Payments add-on allows you to create, market and sell products online. Automate your sales funnel and program delivery and pay out your earnings through Stripe. This add-on is a $10 USD monthly subscription for Grow and Pro plans and it is included in the Studio plan cost.

You will be moved onto our Free plan with limited access to ABC Trainerize features and add-ons, and limited to being able to train 1 active client limit. All clients above the Free plan limit will be automatically deactivated. If you are using Payments in ABC Trainerize, all active recurring products will be canceled and will not renew. If you have a Custom Branded App, it will be deactivated and you will need to use the main ABC Trainerize app.

features_raw: Workout templates - Build workout templates in under a minute that can copied and pasted for several clients.
Drag and Drop Workout Builder - create any workout you can dream up, from AMRAPs to Strength Sets with our drag and drop workout builder.
Video Library - Our extensive video library comes pre-loaded with 3,500+ professionally recorded exercise demonstrations and allows you to add your own!
Interval and HIIT Training - TrueCoach's mobile app has a built-in timer to help with rest periods, intervals, and more.
Printable Sheets - Any client workout can be saved and printed in PDF format for times when signal may be spotty!
Custom Instructions - Add unique instructions and notes to individual exercises and circuits to increase client efficacy and tracking.
Client Milestones - Clients receive personal badges and are notified when they hit certain workout milestones.
Client Updates - Capture progress pictures, body metrics, macros, diet, and custom data points to keep your clients engaged from every angle.
Progression Tracking - Client are able to view progress in reps, weights, heart rate, and more with TrueCoach’s dedicated mobile app.
Habit Tracking - Create custom habits for your clients to complete on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis to allow them to excel in and outside the gym!
Meal Plans - Deliver custom meal plans through our integrated “Documents” Feature.
Nutrition Education - Get certified with Precision Nutrition for less with our exclusive Partner Perk.
In-App Messaging - Keep in touch with all of your clients with our dedicated coaching app.
Multi-Media Messaging Support - Keep your clients engaged and provide form cues with the ability to send pictures, videos, and even GIFs!
Coach Notifications - Set custom permissions for e-mail and push notifications to get alerted when you need to be!
Client Notifications - Alert your clients when they’ve been assigned a new workout or you send them a message!
Group Messaging - Keep your groups organized and engaged with dedicated group messaging!
Real-Time Messaging - Touch base with your clients no matter where in the world they might be, whether to answer a workout-specific question or just to check in.
Notifications - With both push and e-mail notifications, you’ll never miss an update when a client completes a workout, leaves feedback, or sends you a message!
Public Profiles - Allow clients to find you with a custom storefront webpage, and let them contact you directly to apply to work with you.
Client Management With Integrated Communication Tools
Client Onboarding - Keep in touch with all of your clients with our dedicated coaching app.
Pausing Clients - Sometimes clients just need a break. Easily archive your clients for easy re-activation when they’re ready to start up again.
Client Dashboard - Keep all the important and relevant information on all your clients in one, easy-to-use dashboard.
Automated Risk Assessment - Get alerted when clients start to lose compliance and proactively reach out to avoid client churn.
Client Organization - Filter your clients by name, program due date, and more to give attention where it’s needed.
Client Progress - See your clients’ progress with custom metrics, progress photos, and more.
Coach Profiles - A powerful tool that boosts your visibility, highlights your expertise, and lets potential clients find your services directly, all in one place. (Available on Standard+ plans)
Custom Branding - Customize the TrueCoach app with your logo and any color you can imagine to make the experience truly yours.
Real-time Metrics - Access key data points from your clients' wearables, allowing you to monitor performance metrics instantly and make informed coaching decisions on the fly.
Personalized Insights - Gain deeper insights into your clients' activity levels, sleep patterns, and recovery metrics, enabling you to tailor training programs precisely to their individual needs.
Partner Perks - Gain exclusive access to discounts on education, certifications, clothing, and more with TrueCoach’s expansive library of Partner Perks.
NASM CEU Library - Save up to 33% on continuing education with NASM with TrueCoach’s embedded CEU Library for 24/7 access to the latest courses and learning resources.
